domains.description: Checkout orders created before payment attempts, used for funnel analysis.

entities.description: A single order initiated on Razorpay before any payment attempt.
entities.name: Checkout Order

columns.description: Channel or interface used to place the order: web, mobile_sdk, api, plugin, or dashboard.
columns.name: checkout_surface

columns.description: Intended transaction value of the order at creation time.
columns.name: order_amount

columns.description: Unique identifier for a checkout order; links orders to payment attempts.
columns.name: order_ref
columns.sql_guidance: Join orders to payments on order_ref to count attempts per order.

columns.description: Lifecycle status of the order: paid, created, cancelled, or expired.
columns.name: order_state
columns.sql_guidance: Filter order_state = 'paid' to count converted orders; use all states for funnel analysis.

columns.description: Timestamp when the checkout order was created.
columns.name: order_time

columns.description: Razorpay product line associated with the order: checkout, payments, payouts, subscriptions, or marketplace.
columns.name: product_area

columns.description: The user or merchant that created this order; links to users and user_attributes.
columns.name: user_ref

tables.description: Every checkout order created on Razorpay before a payment attempt, with lifecycle state and product area.
tables.name: orders

domains.name: Orders

domains.description: Payment rail and routing attributes such as method, issuer, settlement speed, and risk.

entities.description: A unique payment route with method, issuer, routing partner, and risk classification.
entities.name: Payment Rail

columns.description: Authentication method used for the payment: upi_pin, otp_or_3ds, bank_auth, or wallet_auth.
columns.name: authentication_mode

columns.description: Bank or financial institution associated with the payment rail, such as HDFC, ICICI, SBI, or NPCI.
columns.name: issuer_name

columns.description: Unique identifier for a payment rail; join key to the payments table.
columns.name: rail_ref

columns.description: Payment method or network: UPI, CC, DC, IMPS, NEFT, NETBANKING, or WALLET.
columns.name: rail_type
columns.sql_guidance: Join payments to payment_attributes on rail_ref then group by rail_type to slice TPV or PSR by payment method.

columns.description: Risk classification of the payment rail: low, medium, or high.
columns.name: risk_band

columns.description: Razorpay internal routing partner used to process the payment.
columns.name: route_partner

columns.description: Settlement timeline for this rail: instant, same_day, or t_plus_1.
columns.name: settlement_speed

tables.description: Attributes of each payment rail including type, issuer, routing partner, settlement speed, authentication mode, and risk band.
tables.name: payment_attributes

domains.name: Payment Routing

domains.description: Payment transaction attempts and their outcomes, the core of all payment metrics.

entities.description: A single payment transaction attempt with amount, status, and timestamp.
entities.name: Payment Attempt

columns.description: Transaction amount for this payment attempt; sum over successful payments for TPV.
columns.name: amount
columns.sql_guidance: Sum amount WHERE payment_status = 'SUCCESS' to calculate TPV; do not filter by status for attempted volume.

columns.description: The order this payment attempt belongs to; links payments to the orders table.
columns.name: order_ref

columns.description: Unique identifier for a single payment attempt.
columns.name: payment_ref
columns.sql_guidance: Count distinct payment_ref for total payment attempts (PSR denominator).

columns.description: Outcome of the payment attempt: SUCCESS, FAILED, AUTHORIZED, or REFUNDED.
columns.name: payment_status
columns.sql_guidance: PSR = COUNT(*) FILTER (payment_status='SUCCESS') / COUNT(*) across all statuses; do not pre-filter for PSR denominator.

columns.description: Timestamp when the payment attempt occurred; primary time dimension for all payment analytics.
columns.name: payment_time
columns.sql_guidance: Truncate to month for calendar-month grouping; use date part for DAU; data spans Dec 2025 to Jun 2026.

columns.description: Payment rail used for this attempt; join to payment_attributes to get rail type and other routing details.
columns.name: rail_ref
columns.sql_guidance: Join payments to payment_attributes on rail_ref to slice metrics by rail_type.

columns.description: The user or merchant that made this payment attempt; used for all user-level metrics.
columns.name: user_ref
columns.sql_guidance: Filter payment_status = 'SUCCESS' before counting distinct user_ref for active user metrics.

tables.description: Every payment attempt on Razorpay with amount, status, rail, order, user, and timestamp.
tables.name: payments

domains.name: Payments

domains.description: Demographic, geographic, KYC, and risk attributes for each user or merchant.

entities.description: Demographic and risk profile attributes for a Razorpay user or merchant.
entities.name: User Profile

columns.description: Age of the user in years, ranging from 19 to 68.
columns.name: age

columns.description: City where the user is located, covering major Indian cities.
columns.name: city

columns.description: Self-reported gender of the user: M, F, or Other.
columns.name: gender

columns.description: KYC verification status of the user: verified, pending, or rejected.
columns.name: kyc_status

columns.description: Risk tier assigned to the user for transaction monitoring: low, medium, or high.
columns.name: risk_band

columns.description: Indian state where the user is located; primary geographic dimension for state-level analysis.
columns.name: state
columns.sql_guidance: Use state for geographic slicing; combine with city for finer granularity.

columns.description: Unique identifier for the user; join key to payments, orders, and users tables.
columns.name: user_ref

tables.description: Demographic, geographic, KYC, and risk attributes for each Razorpay user or merchant.
tables.name: user_attributes

domains.name: User Demographics & Risk

domains.description: Merchant account profiles including type, plan, acquisition channel, and signup date.

entities.description: A Razorpay merchant or user account with plan, type, and acquisition details.
entities.name: Merchant Account

columns.description: Current operational status of the merchant account: active, paused, restricted, or closed.
columns.name: account_state
columns.sql_guidance: Filter account_state = 'active' to restrict analysis to operational accounts.

columns.description: How the merchant was acquired: self_serve, sales, referral, partner, or marketplace.
columns.name: acquisition_channel

columns.description: Country of the merchant account; all accounts in this dataset are India.
columns.name: country

columns.description: Category of the merchant account: enterprise, mid_market, smb, startup, or platform.
columns.name: merchant_type

columns.description: Razorpay pricing plan the merchant is on: starter, growth, scale, or enterprise.
columns.name: platform_plan

columns.description: Timestamp when the merchant or user account was created on Razorpay.
columns.name: signup_time

columns.description: Primary key for the merchant or user account; links to payments, orders, and user_attributes.
columns.name: user_ref

tables.description: Razorpay merchant and user accounts with signup date, merchant type, acquisition channel, plan, and account state.
tables.grain: One row per user or merchant account
tables.name: users

domains.name: Users & Merchants
